title: Nia's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Little Nia explores different emotions through vibrant colors, learning that all feelings are okay and natural.

pages.text: This is Nia. Nia has many feelings every day.

illustration.description: A young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes standing in the center surrounded by swirling abstract colors representing different emotions
illustration.alt: Nia surrounded by colorful emotion swirls

pages.text: When Nia is happy, she feels bright yellow like sunshine. Yellow makes her smile big!

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes dancing joyfully against a bright yellow sunshine background with radiating golden rays
illustration.alt: Happy Nia dancing in yellow sunshine

pages.text: When Nia is sad, she feels blue like gentle rain. Blue tears are okay.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes sitting quietly with soft blue rain drops falling around her in an abstract blue watercolor background
illustration.alt: Sad Nia with blue rain around her

pages.text: When Nia is mad, she feels red like hot fire. Red feelings are big and strong.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes with crossed arms surrounded by swirling red abstract patterns and fiery red background
illustration.alt: Angry Nia with red swirls around her

pages.text: When Nia is calm, she feels green like soft grass. Green is peaceful and quiet.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes sitting peacefully in meditation pose against a serene green background with flowing grass-like patterns
illustration.alt: Calm Nia in peaceful green setting

pages.text: All of Nia's feelings are good. Red, blue, yellow, green - every color, every feeling belongs to her.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes with arms outstretched, surrounded by a beautiful rainbow of all emotion colors swirling harmoniously together
illustration.alt: Nia embracing all colorful emotions together

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color does Nia feel when she is happy?
questions.explanation: Nia feels bright yellow like sunshine when she is happy!

questions.question: What color does Nia feel when she is sad?
questions.explanation: Nia feels blue like gentle rain when she is sad.

questions.question: Are all of Nia's feelings good?
questions.explanation: Yes! All of Nia's feelings are good and belong to her.
